hypotheses.reasoning: Why this hypothesis was confirmed — cite specific evidence
Why this threat hypothesis was ruled out — cite specific evidence

flow.observation: What was found — be specific with numbers, IPs, usernames

conditions: Condition that must hold for this precedent to match a future alert
refutes: Observation that would invalidate this precedent match

key_indicators: field:value (context that makes this indicator diagnostic)

alert_data._comment: Raw alert fields from the original investigation — copy from alert.json
